category_sources: source_facts.description says this is a Go implementation of a configuration language for defining JSON data; official jsonnet.org describes Jsonnet as a configuration language.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is go-jsonnet; source_facts.repo is https://github.com/google/go-jsonnet.
docs_sources: Official jsonnet.org tutorial links to getting started and detailed language reference; jsonnet.org also provides standard library reference.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/google/go-jsonnet; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies configuration language for JSON data; official jsonnet.org learning/reference pages document Jsonnet language use.
